_comment: v4.4.6 REPL replay battery — checks user-facing surface text after Codex 2026-04-27 caught two defects (CheckContradiction renderer, AskAge self-recall) that the cognitive_eval harness missed because the trace signals were correct, only the rendered text was wrong. Complementary to cognitive_dialog_dataset.json: cognitive eval asserts on trace fields (action / intent / epistemic / belief), this asserts on what the user actually sees. Per CONTRIBUTING.md, every surface-text defect ships with at least one new dialog here.

dialogs.description: User introduces self by name; the reply must surface the name back so the user sees they were heard.

v4.4.9 PROMOTED: user states their city, reply surfaces the canonical name. The pre-v4.4.6 «түсіндім» bare variant at index 0 of `statement_of_location` was rewritten in v4.4.9 to «{city} екен, түсіндім» so every variant interpolates `{city}`. The dialog is now canonical and locks the slot-echo invariant against future regressions.

v4.4.9 PROMOTED: user states their age, reply surfaces the number. Pre-v4.4.6 the `statement_of_age` family had two bare variants («жақсы жас», «қуатты кезеңіңіз») that didn't echo `{age}`. v4.4.9 rewrote them as «{age} — жақсы жас» / «{age} — қуатты кезеңіңіз» so every variant interpolates the number.

v4.4.9 PROMOTED: user states profession, reply surfaces the role. Pre-v4.4.6 the `statement_of_occupation` family had two bare variants («түсіндім», «еңбегіңізге сәттілік») that didn't echo `{occupation}`. v4.4.9 rewrote them as «{occupation} екен, түсіндім» / «{occupation} еңбегіңізге сәттілік».

v4.4.9-tightened: after introducing a name, asking `менің атым кім?` must return the stored name AND must NOT echo the question word `кім` as if it were a name (the latter half locks v4.4.9's interrogative-pronoun guard in place — pre-v4.4.9 the reply contained both `Дәулет` and `Кім` as a phantom-contradiction clarifying question, so the dialog passed the substring check by accident).

v4.4.9-tightened: after stating a city, asking `мен қайда тұрамын?` must surface the stored city via `ask_location.with_known_user`. Both turns now carry slot-echo assertions — the v4.4.9 `statement_of_location` rewrite made the setup turn assertable.

v4.4.5 regression — `менің жасым қанша?` after `менің жасым 40` was misclassified as StatementOfAge { years: None } pre-v4.4.5; the reply happened to surface 40 only because statement_of_age interpolates session.age. Post-v4.4.5 this routes to AskAge / ask_age.with_known_user. v4.4.9-tightened: setup turn now carries an `age` slot-echo assertion (the statement_of_age family rewrite made it assertable).
After stating occupation, the system must be able to surface it on a follow-up self-question via `ask_occupation.with_known_user`.

v4.4.5 (Codex 2026-04-27 REPL): two contradictory city statements must produce a clarifying question that names BOTH candidates. Pre-v4.4.5 the renderer fell through to statement_of_location and emitted «Алматыда екеніңізді есте сақтаймын» — committing to one of the contested values. The `output_not_contains_lower` assertion on turn 1 locks the bug closed. v4.4.9-tightened: setup turn (turn 0) now carries a `city` slot-echo assertion.
v4.4.0 dismissal: after a contradiction is logged, replying `білмеймін` clears both candidates from belief and the reply must acknowledge the dismissal — no statement-of-* confirmation.
v4.4.0 dismissal alternative trigger: `екеуі де жоқ` after the conflict prompt; same effect as `білмеймін`.
v4.3.4: `сен кімсің` must surface adam's identity, including either the abbreviation NLM or the full name Nano Language Model.
v4.3.4 Creator aspect: `сені кім жасады` must surface the creator's surname.
v4.3.4 Birthdate aspect: `қашан пайда болдың` must surface the canonical date 2026-04-07.
v4.3.4 Architecture aspect: `сенің ерекшелігің не` must mention `архитектур`.
v4.3.0 canonical geography: asking about Қазақстан must surface a substantive reply (not a refusal), since geography_kz.jsonl carries curated entries.
v4.3.5 famous Kazakhs: asking about Әуезов via `туралы` marker must surface a substantive reply, since kz_literature.jsonl carries the curated entry.
Asking about an unknown proper noun via `туралы` should produce a tentative / clarifying reply that surfaces the topic itself, not a confident-sounding fabrication.
Bare `сәлем` must return a greeting, not a refusal or error.
`рахмет` returns a non-empty social acknowledgement.
`кешіріңіз` returns a non-empty social acknowledgement, not a refusal.
Empty / whitespace input must not crash and must produce a graceful refusal or fallback, not a confident statement.
Pure punctuation input is gracefully rejected.
v4.3.1 person canonicalisation: lowercase / mixed-case name forms collapse to canonical title-cased form when echoed back.
v4.3.2 phantom-city fix: `мен жасанды интеллектпен айналысамын` must NOT log a phantom city `Жасанды`. The reply should not commit to any city; subsequent topic turn must work normally.

v4.3.5 topic_marker_hint: `Жазушы Мүсірепов туралы не білесіз?` must extract `Мүсірепов` (proper noun before `туралы`) as the topic, not `жазушы` (common noun won pre-v4.3.5). The reply surfaces the proper noun.

v4.3.3: compound `А, сен кімсің және атың кім?` after a name introduction must route to AskAboutSystem (the pronoun-led `сен кімсің` part wins), so adam introduces itself rather than echoing the user's name.

turns.user: А, сен кімсің және атың кім?

dialogs.description: Asking about the same topic twice in a row must not produce a regressive reply; both turns surface a substantive answer.

A multi-slot profile build: name, age, city all in sequence. v4.4.9-tightened: every turn now asserts on its own slot echo (the statement_of_age + statement_of_location rewrite removed the bare variants that made age/city turns unassertable pre-v4.4.9).

v4.4.9 explicit lock for the bug REPL replay surfaced in v4.4.6 and v4.4.8 deferred. Pre-v4.4.9 `менің атым кім?` parsed as `StatementOfName { name: Кім }` because `detect_statement_of_name`'s pattern 1 (`атым X`) blindly grabbed the next token. Once a real name was already stored, this logged a phantom `BeliefConflict` (Дәулет vs Кім) and emitted a clarifying-question reply naming both. Post-v4.4.9: interrogative-pronoun guard in `detect_statement_of_name` + 1sg-self-recall extension to `detect_ask_name` route this to `Intent::AskName` and the `ask_name.with_known_user` template family.

v4.4.10 (2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript): `Танысайық.` («let's get acquainted») must trigger `greeting.intro_proposal` and surface adam's name. Pre-v4.4.10 the form fell through every greeting branch and landed on the safe-fallback refusal `қайта айтыңызшы`. The new `GreetingKind::IntroProposal` variant + `greeting.intro_proposal` template family routes this correctly.

v4.4.10 (2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript): `Қазақстанда қанша облыс бар?` must surface a fact containing `17`. Pre-v4.4.10 the system had no fact about oblast count and regurgitated the basic «Қазақстан — Орталық Азиядағы ел». v4.4.10 authored 17 oblast entries + a `қазақстан has_quantity облыс` fact with surface text «Қазақстанда 17 облыс бар.».

v4.4.10 (2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript): `Қысқасы, сен ештеңе білмейсің.` must NOT surface a proverb about wives («Әйеліммен кеңессем ештеңе етпей ме?»). Pre-v4.4.10 the FST returned root `қысқа` and retrieval matched a tangential proverb keyed on `қысқа`. NOT_A_TOPIC additions for `қысқа` + `ештеңе` block the misfire. Acceptable downstream behaviour: a Tentative refusal or a generic acknowledgement, but no proverb output.

v4.4.11 (closes v4.4.10 carry-forward): `Қазақстан аймақтарының атауларын білесіз бе?` — input-morpheme-overlap reranker now picks the `қазақстан related_to аймақтар тізімі` fact (`raw_text`: «Қазақстанның аймақтары — 17 облыс пен 3 республикалық маңызы бар қала.») over the most-central «Қазақстан — Орталық Азиядағы ел» IsA fact. Pre-v4.4.11 the predicate-rank tier (IsA=0, RelatedTo=6) made IsA always win regardless of query content.

v4.4.11: `Қазақстанда қандай көлдер бар?` surfaces the lakes list-summary fact. The reranker scores «көлдер» as a content-token match against the fact's `raw_text` («Қазақстандағы ірі көлдер мен теңіздер: Балқаш, Каспий, Арал, Зайсан, Алакөл, Тенгіз, Маркакөл.»), and the v4.4.11 RelatedTo renderer surfaces `raw_text` because the object root «көлдер тізімі» contains «тізім».
v4.6.12: «Қалыңыз қалай?» (polite-plural form) routes to AskHowAreYou. Pre-v4.6.12 fell through to refusal.

v4.6.12: `greeting.intro_proposal` template grammar fix. Pre-v4.6.12 the 4th variant said «сіз қалай танысамыз?» which is grammatically incoherent (2sg-polite pronoun + 1pl-future verb). Replaced with «сізді қалай атаймын?». Reply must NOT contain the broken phrasing.

v4.6.12: Russian-only input («Это очень круто, а кто тебя создал?») routes to `unknown.non_kazakh` template family. Real-REPL 2026-04-29: pre-v4.6.12 surfaced half-Russian half-Kazakh hybrid response violating the Kazakh-only directive.

turns.user: Это очень круто, а кто тебя создал?

dialogs.description: v4.6.12: «Ал ол сені қашан жаратты?» routes to AskAboutSystem(Birthdate). Pre-v4.6.12 `қашан жаратты` was missing from Birthdate detector verb list.
v4.6.12: «Сіз неше жастасыз?» routes to AskAge; with no session.age, falls through to the bare `ask_age` family which is the correct system-self response.

v4.7.0: programming_rust.jsonl world_core domain (110 entries). Kazakh-paraphrased Rust concepts (иелік, трейт, тіршілік мерзімі, сілтеме) surface as IsA definitions through retrieval. Latin-name queries (Rust/Cargo/rustc) are a known v4.7.0 gap — deferred to a later patch once Rust Book chapter content surfaces enough context to justify ASCII-identifier passthrough.
v4.6.20: «Өзіңізді кім деп санайсыз?» routes to AskAboutSystem(General). Pre-v4.6.20 fell through to «Бәлкім, өзіңіз туралы айтасыз ба» (misclassified as user-self-intro request).

v4.6.20: «Басқа жасанды интеллект модельдерінен несімен артықсыз?» routes to AskAboutSystem(SelfComparison) and surfaces an honest trade-off statement. Pre-v4.6.20 grabbed `басқа` and quoted random poetry.

turns.user: Басқа жасанды интеллект модельдерінен несімен артықсыз?
Қолданыстағы модельдерден қалай жақсырақ бола аласыз?

dialogs.description: v4.6.20: «Машиналық оқыту туралы айтып беріңізші» preserves the modifier `машиналық` in the noun-hint. Pre-v4.6.20 reduced to `оқыту` and surfaced a generic education quote.

v4.6.20: discourse preamble «Айтайын дегенім, …» stripped before parsing so the residual clause's intent (here SelfComparison) surfaces correctly. Pre-v4.6.20 the preamble caused noun-hint extraction to grab `қолданыс` and quote contract-template prose.

turns.user: Айтайын дегенім, қолданыстағы модельдерден қалай жақсырақсыз?

dialogs.description: v4.6.20: «Мен сенің әлі бәрін білмейтініңді … түсіндім» (multi-clause empathetic admission) routes to the new UserAcknowledgement intent + dedicated polite template family. Pre-v4.6.20 grabbed the closed-class adverb `әлі` and pulled a random poetry quote.

turns.user: Мен сенің әлі бәрін білмейтініңді және әлі де көп жаттығу керек екенін түсіндім.

dialogs.description: v4.6.15: `mathematics_basic.jsonl` and `informatics_basic.jsonl` add school-curriculum IsA definitions for математика, информатика, алгоритм, бағдарлама, файл — verifiable through retrieval-aware Conversation.

v4.6.15: pure-arithmetic input «5+5» routes to the `math_answer` family with the computed result. Pre-v4.6.12 fell through to «Түсінбедім»; v4.6.12 routed to refusal; v4.6.15 evaluates and answers with the integer.
v4.6.12: «Алтыны екіге бөліңіз» routes to math_refusal. Pre-v4.6.12 surfaced «Алтын — сары түс» (gold/six homonym ambiguity) — math detection now intercepts before topic extraction.
v4.6.5: «Ал сені кім жаратты?» routes to AskAboutSystem(Creator). Pre-v4.6.5 `жаратты` was missing from the Creator detector verb list.
v4.6.5: «Сізді кім дамытқан?» (developed) routes to Creator.
v4.6.5: «Сізді қай бағдарламашы дайындады?» (which programmer prepared) routes to Creator.
v4.6.5: «Принциптерің қандай?» surfaces adam's operational principles list — respect humans, no fabrication, no incitement, privacy, etc.

v4.6.5: every reply starts with an uppercase letter (sentence-case). This is the lock for the realiser's `capitalise_first_letter` orthographic pass — implemented as substring assertions because uppercase-prefix can't be expressed via the existing `output_contains_lower_any` check (which lowercases). Use a positive control: the input «Сәлем» replies with the verbatim greeting which starts with capital `С`. The harness's `output_not_contains_lower` checks against a lowercased copy, so we can't directly assert capitalisation here — covered by the `realiser_capitalises_and_periods_declarative_replies` e2e test instead. This dialog locks the surface form remains non-empty under the orthographic pass.

v4.6.0: «Не істей аласың?» must surface the capabilities list (KZ morphology, slot recall, KZ geography knowledge, etc.). Pre-v4.6.0 fell through to «басқа сұрақ қойсаңыз» generic refusal — no detector matched. New SystemAspect::Capabilities + ask_about_system.capabilities template family.
v4.6.0: «Не білесің?» (standalone, no `туралы`) routes to SystemAspect::Knowledge and surfaces the world_core inventory digest.
v4.6.0: «Нені істей алмайсың?» routes to SystemAspect::Limitations. Critical for trust — explicit limitations make the envelope discoverable.

v4.6.0: «Өзіңіз туралы айтып беріңізші» routes to SystemAspect::General — adam introduces itself. Real-REPL 2026-04-29 transcript: pre-v4.6.0 fell through to «Бәлкім, өзіңіз туралы айтасыз ба» which is a refusal-clarification.

v4.6.0 discourse-anaphora resolution. Multi-turn: «Қазақстан туралы не білесіз?» sets last_query_topic; «Ал онда қанша аймақ бар?» must answer about Kazakhstan's regions, not «Он — сан». New `discourse.rs` module + `last_query_topic` session slot.

v4.6.0 NOT_A_TOPIC additions: `өте` (intensifier) and `жалпы` (in general) must not leak as topics. Pre-v4.6.0: «Бұл өте қызықты, бірақ жалпы не істей аласыз?» surfaced a tangential proverb keyed on `өте`. Post-v4.6.0: capabilities aspect fires (the «істей аласың» marker) and `өте/жалпы` are filtered out anyway.

turns.user: Бұл өте қызықты, бірақ жалпы не істей аласыз?

dialogs.description: v4.6.0: «Қазақстанда қандай көрікті жерлер бар?» surfaces the new `geo_kz_110` landmarks list-summary fact (Бурабай, Шарын каньоны, Хан Тәңірі, …).

v4.4.13: `Қазақстандағы өзендер қандай?` surfaces the rivers list-summary fact. Pre-v4.4.13 this was already failing, just less obviously: with v4.4.10's first_noun_root fallback, `өзен` (now parseable post-v4.4.13 lexicon-dedup fix) would mask the locative-attributive signal. v4.4.13 reordered `best_noun_hint` to run `locative_attributive_hint` BEFORE `first_noun_root` because `-дағы` is a strong topic-narrowing signal (semantically equivalent to a `туралы` marker for the word it attaches to).
v4.4.13: `Қазақстандағы көлдер қандай?` surfaces the lakes list-summary fact. Same chain as the rivers dialog above.
v4.4.13: `Қазақстандағы шөлдер қандай?` surfaces the deserts list-summary fact.

v4.4.12 (closes v4.4.11 carry-forward): `Қазақстандағы таулар қандай?` — the locative-attributive `-дағы` suffix is not yet modelled in FST morphotactics, so `қазақстандағы` returns no FST analysis. v4.4.12 added a string-level `locative_attributive_hint` fallback that strips the 4-char `-дағы / -дегі / -тағы / -тегі` tail and recovers the base noun. Combined with v4.4.11's input-overlap reranker, the question now surfaces the mountains list-summary fact.

v4.4.11: `Қазақстанда қандай таулар бар?` surfaces the mountains list-summary fact (raw_text: «Қазақстандағы ірі тау жоталары: Алтай, Тянь-Шань, Жетісу Алатауы, Қаратау, Ұлытау; биік шыңы — Хан Тәңірі.»). Note: the alternate phrasing `Қазақстандағы таулар қандай?` does NOT yet route correctly — the FST stumbles on the compound `-дағы` suffix and `қазақстандағы` is not recognised as a topic. Tracked for a future FST-coverage patch.
v4.4.11: `Қазақстанда қандай шөлдер бар?` surfaces the deserts list-summary fact.

v4.4.10 multi-turn introduction flow mirroring the 2026-04-28 real-REPL transcript opening: greeting → wellbeing → intro proposal → name introduction. All four turns must produce non-refusal replies that progress the dialog.

v4.1.0 belief revision: explicit self-correction `жоқ, мен Алматыда тұрамын` after a city statement updates the active fact. Final reply surfaces the corrected city via the belief_revision template family which interpolates `{new_value}` deterministically.

v4.11.6: «Физика туралы не білесіз?» must surface the physics definition AND adam's knowledge claim with topic enumeration (mechanics/thermodynamics/electricity/optics/atomic physics). Locks the rich-fact-wins-on-tiebreak ordering against future regressions.

v4.11.6: «Химия туралы не білесіз?» must surface chemistry definition + adam's knowledge claim with topic enumeration. Pre-v4.11.6 surfaced the scant `Химия — ғылым.` from society.jsonl due to shorter-wins length tiebreak.
v4.11.6: «Биология туралы не білесіз?» must surface biology definition + adam's knowledge claim with topic enumeration.

v4.11.6: «Тарих туралы не білесіз?» must surface a rich тарих definition + adam's claim with epoch enumeration. Pre-v4.11.6 only the scant `Тарих — ғылым.` existed; v4.11.6 added rich тарих entry to history_kazakhstan.jsonl + adam_self knowledge claim.
v4.11.6: «Математика туралы не білесіз?» must surface math definition + adam's claim with topic enumeration.
v4.11.6: «Информатика туралы не білесіз?» must surface informatics definition + adam's claim with topic enumeration.

v4.11.6: «Адам, сен биологияны білесің бе?» — pre-v4.11.6 returned bare `Түсінбедім.` because FST has lexicon gap on accusative-form loanwords (`биологияны = биология + Acc`) and no upstream noun-hint strategy recovered the stem. v4.11.6 added string-level accusative-allomorph stripper as a final fallback in `best_noun_hint`. Combined with v4.11.5 vocative guard, the response now grounds on the biology definition.
v4.11.6: «Қазақстан тарихы туралы не білесіз?» surfaces the rich Kazakhstan-history multiword fact. Locks the inherited v4.11.0 history domain plus v4.11.5 multiword-first priority.

v4.12.0: «Сіз қандай тілде жазылғансыз?» / «Сіз қандай бағдарламалау тілінде жазылғансыз?» routes to SystemAspect::Implementation and surfaces the Rust + crate-stack self-knowledge claim. Pre-v4.12.0 grounded on the generic `бағдарламалау тілі IsA формалды тіл` fact instead of adam's actual implementation language. Also locks the v4.12.0 backtick carve-out in `audit_response::contains_latin` — without it the Latin tokens `Rust`, `adam-kernel`, `macOS`, `Linux` would trip LatinCharactersForbidden.
v4.12.0: alternative phrasing «Не тілінде жасалғансың?» also routes to SystemAspect::Implementation. Locks the implementation-marker detector in `detect_ask_about_system`.

v4.12.0: «Неліктен жасуша өледі?» pre-v4.12.0 surfaced the most-central IsA fact (`жасуша IsA материя` or similar) — logically wrong because adam asserted what жасуша IS when the user asked WHY it dies. v4.12.0 routes QuestionShape::Causal to `unknown.causal.with_fact` template which states the available context AND explicitly says adam can't pinpoint the cause. Honest epistemic hedging.

v4.12.0: «Адам, неліктен су қайнайды?» — vocative-stripped, then QuestionShape::Causal routes to causal template. Verifies the v4.11.5 vocative guard composes cleanly with the v4.12.0 question-shape detector.

v4.13.0+: «Сіз оны бағдарламалай аласыз ба, әлі жоқ па?» pre-v4.13.0 surfaced confidently-wrong content (poetry on `әлі` / `жоқ` / `па`) because `әлі / әлде / мүмкін / тағы / жоқ / иә / па / пе` were missing from NOT_A_TOPIC. v4.13.0 added them. v4.13.5 then added `SystemAspect::GenericCapability` which catches the `аласыз ба` pattern and routes to honest fallback («Жоқ, ондай әрекетті өзім орындай алмаймын. Мен — тілдік модельмін»). The assertion is now: output contains the generic-capability honest fallback OR the v4.13.0-era «түсінбедім» fallback. Either way, NOT poetry.

turns.user: Сіз оны бағдарламалай аласыз ба, әлі жоқ па?

dialogs.description: v4.13.0: foundational multi-turn anaphora. Turn 1 establishes Rust as topic; turn 2 says «Сіз оны...» — `оны` is the accusative anaphor, pre-v4.13.0 NOT in DISCOURSE_ANAPHORS so the topic could not be carried over. v4.13.0 adds Acc/Dat/Gen anaphor forms AND introduces DialogContext which preserves the subject across the entire conversation (not just one-turn back-reference). Result: turn 2 reuses Rust as the topic via `subject_under_discussion`.

v4.13.5: «Сіз бағдарлама жаза аласыз ба?» / «Сіз санай аласыз ба?» / «Сіз есептей аласыз ба?» — generic verb-capability questions where the verb is NOT a language ability (those route to Capabilities aspect from v4.6.0). Pre-v4.13.5 the language-capability detector required a {language adverb} prefix, so these fell through to greedy retrieval. v4.13.5 adds SystemAspect::GenericCapability + detector on `аласың/аласыз ба/ма` + `ала ма?` + `алады ма` patterns. Routes to the honest fallback template that surfaces `system_generic_capability` summary: «Жоқ, ондай әрекетті өзім орындай алмаймын. Мен — тілдік модельмін...».

v4.13.5: «Сіз математика, физика, химия, биология, астрономия және тағы басқа пәндер бойынша мектептегі біліміңізді білесіз бе?» — multi-topic capability question where the user lists 3+ subjects. Pre-v4.13.5 the topic extractor grabbed `мектеп` (first content noun after closed-class filter) and surfaced an IsA fact. v4.13.5 adds SystemAspect::MultiTopicCapability + detector on (2+ commas) + `және` + `білесің/білесіз`. Detector uses raw_input for comma counting (joined drops punctuation). Routes to honest fallback: «Аталған пәндер бойынша негізгі түсініктерім бар... Бірақ мектеп бағдарламасының толық мазмұны менде жоқ».

turns.user: Сіз математика, физика, химия, биология, астрономия және тағы басқа пәндер бойынша мектептегі біліміңізді білесіз бе?

dialogs.description: v4.14.0: «Оқушылар мектепте физика пәнінен не оқиды?» — curriculum-content question (factual: what do students learn?). Pre-v4.14.0 the topic extractor grabbed `оқушы` (first content noun) and surfaced a greedy IsA fact like «Оқушы мектеп құрамына кіреді». v4.14.0 adds Intent::AskCurriculumContent + detector requiring all four signals: subject (student-class) + education locus + question word `не` + learning verb. Routes to dedicated `ask_curriculum_content` template family that says: this is curriculum content, I don't have it; here's what I CAN do. Closes the third 2026-05-01 transcript failure pattern.

turns.user: Оқушылар мектепте физика пәнінен не оқиды?

dialogs.description: v4.14.0: «Студенттер университетте не оқиды?» — alternative phrasing of the curriculum-content pattern (студент + университет + не + оқиды). Verifies the detector's flexibility across student-class subjects and education-locus tokens, not just the canonical school + student combination.

v4.14.5: «Жасуша туралы не білесіз?» — single-domain canonical query. Verifies the new domain-aware retrieval tiebreaker is strictly ADDITIVE: pre-existing single-domain queries continue to surface the rich biology_school definition («Жасуша — тірі ағзаның құрылыс және функционалды бірлігі»). The tiebreaker only kicks in when overlap + priority + length cascades have all tied; for ordinary queries it's a no-op. Ensures v4.14.5 doesn't regress the v4.11.7 longer-object-wins fix.

v4.14.5: sentence_decomp focus fallback when greedy noun_hint is None. Verifies that questions where best_noun_hint returns None (FST recovered no usable content noun) still find a topic via sentence_decomp.decompose — provided focus_role is in {Subject, Object, Source, Locus}, NOT Predicate. Strictly additive: turns where greedy already returned a noun are bit-identical pre/post-v4.14.5. The smoke check uses a normal query that should succeed; if it returns 'Түсінбедім', the v4.14.5 fallback chain regressed.

v4.15.5: SuffixPriors runtime integration must NOT regress canonical topic queries. The priors-driven re-rank uses a stable sort, so equal-prior parses preserve v3.2.0 lexicographic order; queries where the first parse was already correct should land on the same topic. This dialog locks the v4.x baseline behavior on `Жасуша туралы не білесіз?` and `Алматы туралы айт` — both routed through the priors pipeline since v4.15.5. If either regresses, the prior is changing parse selection in a way that breaks topic extraction.

v4.16.0: bigram-aware FST parse selection (P(chain | preceding_chain)). When prev_chain is known, the re-ranker uses the row of transition_log_prob; falls back to unigram when prev is None or unseen. Locks the canonical baseline on multi-token queries («Қазақстан туралы не білесіз?») where the bigram context has the most signal — `Қазақстан` (Nominative) → `туралы` (postposition) → `не` (question word) — bigram-aware re-rank should still surface the correct Қазақстан-IsA fact.
